llm_proposal.bull_case: Uptrend intact (ADX 27.8, price above 200SMA), shallow pullback to VWAP with RSI cooling to 41 and a volume surge (z 2.1) suggesting accumulation; relative strength 1.06 vs SPY.
llm_proposal.bear_case: RSI not oversold, pullback may extend; volume spike could be distribution not accumulation; market breadth weak today, so a single-name long fights the tape.
llm_proposal.uncertainty: Assumes the VWAP holds as support intraday. Invalidated if price closes below VWAP on rising volume or if SPY breaks its own support. Earnings not near, but a macro print this week could whipsaw.

risk_decision.reject_reason: low_confidence (58.5 < 70 floor; risk discount from market_weakness)

llm_proposal.bear_case: Gapped +2.3% into the breakout (gap risk), RSI 71 overbought, ATR elevated; chasing an extended move is exactly the kind of setup the journal shows losing.
llm_proposal.uncertainty: Breakouts on gaps often fade-and-fill. Invalidated on a close back inside the prior range.

risk_decision.reject_reason: risk_veto (risk_score 66 >= veto threshold 60) + model recommended pass

reflection.text: Correctly passed a gap-extended breakout that subsequently filled the gap and closed red. The risk veto + repeated_failed_pattern flag did their job; gapped breakouts remain low-quality for this account.
